虚像世界的访问者.say: ……还是老样子，一上来就开战？
这才是战场的规矩，不是吗？
……我可从没听说过战斗还有什么规矩一说。
确实……要是顾忌这些，可就得被打趴在地了呢！
性命攸关呢……
黑暗中，两名身穿黑衣的少女正挥舞着与身形极不相称的巨大武器激烈交战着。
泥墙崩碎，碎屑飞溅，扬起的尘沙在空中弥漫。
受战斗余波影响，她们周围形成了一片空无一物的地带。
啊哈，怎么了？看起来你有点喘不过气来呢？
连说话的力气都没有了吗？
你已经察觉到了吧？
……哼~看来你不是边睡边战斗呢。
一瞬间，仿佛之前的战斗只是幻觉一般，两人背靠背站定，各自将刀刃指向周围的黑暗。
仿佛回应她们行动般响起了野兽般的低吼……
同时，从环绕大厅的黑暗中，成群的异形怪物缓缓现身，它们一步步向少女们逼近，不断缩小包围圈——
真是一群特立独行的听众呢……莫非，是你的朋友？
……感觉不到杀意……但能感受到敌意……
你这个人还真是无趣呢！……虽然我早就知道就是了~
……总感觉很奇怪……它们真的是敌人么？
好啦好啦，不管怎么看都是敌人吧？
要是放任不管的话说不定会轻松很多哦……某种意义上~
……我可没有那种爱好。
她们一边警惕着缓缓逼近的怪物，一边继续悠闲地交谈。
自然，怪物们毫不留情地向少女们发起了猛攻。
——也就在那一刻，她们猛然挥出手中的利刃，将所有袭来的攻击一扫而空。
……剩下的话等处理完这些事再说，可以么？
唉，没法子呢。时间宝贵，这次就帮你一把吧~
两人简短交谈几句，便如箭般弹向相反方向，径直冲入敌群之中。
短暂的空白之后，伴随着令人眼花缭乱的闪光，震耳欲聋的破坏声响彻四方——
与此同时的港区雷达站中——
各部门注意，有警报，疑似有异常情况发生。
正在跟进中——
已确认：探测到特殊警报，类型：监视对象启动。
对象设施名：虚像塔。
……虚像塔？我记得是之前莫名其妙出现的奇怪塞壬设施？
……在塞壬镜面海域解除后依然屹立在海面上。
那个休眠设施居然启动了……？
……必须立刻告诉指挥官才行！
咚咚咚——
刚刚的异常警报你们收到了么，是怎么回事？
太好了，我们正打算去找你呢。这是我们目前掌握到的情报——
嗯……没想到是虚像塔出问题了。
情报更新：监测目标周边海域出现异常数据，虚像塔疑似正在重新生成镜面海域，监视器正在陆续离线。
在监视器离线前，在监视对象周边监测到疑似爆炸波动，不过并未在其表面发现异常。
推测：或许是其内部的某种兵器实验现象。
建议：立即前往监视目标进行调查，以获取更多情报。
嗯，我们不能放任这个危险的东西自行启动而对其情况一无所知。
进入虚像塔的路上或许会发生战斗，建议派遣足够的作战部队同行。
那是自然，不过……既然虚像塔是内部出现问题，在必要的情况下，探索队需要进入其内部调查吧？
没错，根据此前历次侦察，我们对于虚像塔内部并不是一无所知的。
我正在计算适用于本次行动的最佳方案，预计还需要一小时四十分。
那让舰队先集结，总之先行动起来。
海伦娜，你们继续保持监控。TB，之后行动时你需要尽可能和探索队全程保持连线。
了解。
指挥官，我去编制作战舰队与探索队。
——好，两小时后所有人港口集合，记得特别检查一下通信线路和装备。
——明白！
……这是，怎么回事？
我应该正在「星间数据流」中遨游才是……
……怎么会出现在这里？
……分身？备份？量产机体？
……这些数据碎片是怎么回事？
……这里是哪儿？为什么会有我的数据碎片……
真是奇怪……
算了，或许是不知道原因为何的BUG出现了吧……
总之……先重启一下——

崩落世界的残痕.say: ……呼……没完没了。
啊呀？已经要认输了吗？你的忍耐力只有这种程度吗？
和之前也没什么两样嘛。
……经历再多次，也不代表我会喜欢这种麻烦事。
确实是这个理。
不过嘛……
告诉我还剩多少敌人，想必也不会遭天谴吧！
与此同时，虚像塔内部入口大厅——
全体探索队成员生命体征检测……一切正常。
数据仪器也全部运转正常哦，已经开始收集数据了~
确认：通信维持稳定连接，音频与数据传输均未发现异常。
数据保护屏障稳定运行，雷达和传感器的各项数值正在同步分析中。
提问：你们可有感受到任何不适感？
没有什么异常哦，就算事先你跟我们说像是玩全息游戏一样进入虚拟空间……
不过这个体验感可是一等一逼真的。
同意，我已经有点开始困了……要是这里有浴缸就好了，TB你能变一个出来么？
抱歉，虚像塔中的空间并非由我主导，所以我不能在其中凭空生成物品。
这样啊……真遗憾。
那靠着墙也可以……？
帝国忽然伸手触碰了墙面，随即墙壁和地面上的纹路开始接连发生变化。
小心！
奇尔沙治连忙将帝国拉离墙壁，但是纹路变化并没有停止。
异常的纹路就像是被病毒侵蚀般地蔓延开来，铺展出一幅极不自然的景象。
唔，这是……？
像某种电子病毒污染一样，好恶心……帝国，你没事吧？
我没什么感觉哦……
数据屏障依然在全功率运行，没有发现帝国身上出现污染现象。
那就好，看来这些奇怪的变化影响不到我们呢。
可以安心探索了~
走吧，我们首先向着推测的爆炸源前进。
一段时间后，以奇尔沙治为首的探索队依然在虚像塔复杂的通路中穿梭着。
到此处为止。就是此前探索行动中绘制地图的尽头了。
TB，一路之上我们所见的通向别的分区的通路与节点全部都依然处于休眠中。
那些覆盖其表面的纹路，似乎并没有激活这些功能不明的区块。
情报依然不足，目前数据保护屏障依然稳定，建议继续向前方调查。
已在地图中标出了推测可以向上方移动的区域。
明白，那我们就继续向上……
一声巨响后，前方一处封闭区域的墙壁突然炸裂。从形成的大洞中，伴随着滚滚沙尘，一位全身黑衣的少女翻滚而出。
紧接着又一位同样身着黑衣、手持大镰刀少女轻盈地落在先前那名少女身旁。
谁！？全员警戒！
两位少女似乎也察觉到了如今有些剑拔弩张的情况，她们轻轻地叹了口气，看向探索队一行人。
……真是运气不佳。
我们迄今为止，有过哪怕一次好运吗？
光是身处此地，就已经是倒霉到极点了吧？
……确实如此。
在少女们彼此交谈之际，墙壁上又连续被炸出数个大洞。
随后，一个又一个异形怪物从中现身。
那些身影乍看之下似乎是熟悉的塞壬，但却比往常更加怪异狰狞。
哦哦……这不简直就是稀有塞壬博览会吗！真是太有意思了！
话说，这里的塞壬残骸能带出虚像塔之外吗？
要试试才能知道。
别总想着做这种危险的事啦！现在的首要任务是先把敌人解决掉！
也是~边打也能收集数据就是了！对我来说完全没问题的！
……你们对它们的敌意更大。
那是自然咯，相比塞壬……你们看上去亲切多了。
先联手料理掉这些怪物如何？
不反对。
伴随着炮火的轰鸣声，两柄夸张的武器再次动了起来——
我应该已经……重启了才对？
为什么我还在这里……？
真麻烦……事到如今，只能自爆了。
这些被困在莫名其妙地点的莫名其妙的碎片！
爆炸吧——！

既携手并肩，也刀剑相向.say: ……下一个。
啊呀啊呀……最终还是选择用拳头解决问题？真是野蛮呢。
伟大的帝国也不会落后……轰炸机，去。
左舷方向已经被她们清理得差不多了，优先处理右舷方向！
齐射施压！别让敌人绕到背后！
欸~那就是最后一个了！大家留手！留个完整点的残骸给我！
烟尘散去，异形的塞壬已经消失无踪。
两名黑衣少女同时停下了手中的动作，不过依然维持着警戒姿态，似乎正在判断接下来的形势走向。
二位请稍等，我是奇尔沙治，她们几位分别是海王星、帝国以及奥列格。
我们一直以来都与塞壬，也就是刚才我们一同消灭的那种敌人进行着战斗。
从刚才二位也在与它们战斗的情况来看，我们之间没有敌对的必要。
如何？可以告诉我们你们的名字么？
……如果你们有这个意愿的话。
我是……BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER。
DEAD MASTER。不过，能否记住这个名字，就取决于你们咯？
我记住了，TB，资料库中有任何关于这两个名字的记录么？
否定。
那看来，恐怕又是“访客”了。
……两位，能告诉我们你们是怎么来到这里的么？
……不清楚。
与BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER战斗的时候，不知怎么的就遇到你们了呢。
你们是迄今为止所有“访客”里……最淡定的，了不起。
……因为习惯了。
对我们来说，这种事情…已经是“家常便饭”了哦~
……这、这样啊，不过有一件重要的事我还需要向你们确认一下。
你们是“此刻真实存在于此的人”，还是和我们一样以“模拟数据”的形式进入此处的呢？
稍等，在此之前，我先来为你们说明一下关于此地的情报吧。
——总之，这里就是这样一处特殊的地方。
嗯……然后呢，这些情报有什么意义？
……能随心所欲地活动四肢，能够奔跑挥刃。那就没有任何问题。
很好。那么，我郑重地邀请你们与我们协力，一同解决这场位于虚像塔中的未知危机。
哎呀，不行哦。我们接下来还准备再打一场呢~
……顺着刚才的气氛来走，为什么会得出这样的结论呢？
……我就知道你会这么说。
走吧，换个地方继续。还是说你想把这些人也牵连进来？
请再稍等一下，我还有一个提议，就算我们不一同行动，至少我们有着共同的敌人。
因此，港区想要为二位提供帮助。
说来听听？
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER小姐，DEAD MASTER小姐，我是领航员-TB。
我的任务是在本次行动中全程为诸位探索队成员提供技术协助。
目前，我已经完成了对于二位情报的记录，并且根据指挥官的提议，设计出了一套能够帮助二位更好适应虚像塔内环境的舰装。
……“舰装”，就是她们刚才在战斗中使用的装备么？
肯定。正在发送数据包——
一阵蓝色的数据流消散后，两位黑衣少女身边各自出现了一些变化。
……没有丝毫违和感。
哼～这叫“舰装”的东西是有些方便啊？
反应就像手脚一样灵敏……到底是什么原理呢？
对我们来说，你们不依靠舰装就能挥出那种威力的剑和大镰刀，反倒才更不可思议呢……
报告：我已成功开启升降机电源，诸位在原地等候升降梯完成充能。
那么事不宜迟，我们快出发吧~
这种靠不住的机器我可敬谢不敏。我一个人走，你们自己坐这个上去吧。
单独行动……会很危险哦。
要只是跟你们一起也就罢了，要我和这家伙装成什么伙伴？也太强人所难了。
我和她，可是永远的宿敌哦？
仿佛是回应DEAD MASTER这句充满杀气的话语，周围的墙壁突然崩塌，比先前更为扭曲丑恶的塞壬人形生物体蜂拥而出。
已经靠到这么近了我们才察觉……这些一道道墙壁围成的区块……真是麻烦。
那么诸位，先走一步咯~
等等，现在不要乱跑啊——！
无视一旁满脸困惑的探索队成员，DEAD MASTER一人举起武器，转瞬间消失在怪物的海洋中。
升降梯充能完毕，正在封闭中，请诸位继续等待。
糟糕……升降梯被某种光芒封闭，我们出不去了！
……真是的，这个人到底在想什么。
就算她能活下来，之后恐怕也很难再跟我们汇合了……
……没关系，我们一定会再次汇合的。
我们就是“注定如此”的存在。
因此，我们无需停留，继续前进吧。
满地残骸中，净化亲再次睁开了双眼。
我说，没完没了了是吧？
既然暂时跑不出去……去四处转转好了。

异形之物.say: 经过了一段比预想中更长的时间，升降梯终于停了下来。
笼罩在升降梯周边的光芒消散后，一行人正式踏入了新的一层。
请注意，此处之后是此前探索行动中从未涉及的区域。
请一边绘制地图，一边谨慎前进。
明白，我们会注意的。
咦？这个是爆炸的声音吧！
……有人在前方战斗。
难道是DEAD MASTER小姐么……？她到得居然比我们还早？
走，我们快去支援。
前方通道尽头的墙壁在炮火中崩塌，扭曲的怪物中，一个操控着巨型装备的扭曲的人形显得格外显眼。
其身体遍布着异样的花纹，如同虚像塔的多数区域一般被某种异形之物侵蚀了。
净化者……？还是净化亲……？
解析：塞壬高阶人型单位——净化者。
推测：由于塔中异常数据而产生的污染型机体，请保持高度戒备。
……是净化亲被污染的可能性呢？
暂时无法排除，需要更多其性能数据。
一行人犹豫之际，那个扭曲的净化者集体正在缓慢却坚定地接近着——
——来了！
没办法了……总之，打完再说！
比预想之中更加强大……那层花纹外壳，大大增加了其防御力。
完全找不到破绽……要加大火力输出了！
……不对，大家后退。
警告：检测到高能量体反应。
就在BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER与TB一同发出警告时，空间突然炸裂，一道凌厉的剑光一闪而过。
电光石火之间，扭曲的净化者机体被一击切断，瘫痪在地上。
而在其身边，已然多出一名黑衣少女的身影——那正是DEAD MASTER。
DEAD MASTER小姐？见到你平安无事真是太好了。
来得好快……感谢支援。
……等一下。
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER出面制止了想要前去打招呼的探索队员们。
……仔细看，DEAD MASTER和她身上的装备。
？！和那台净化者机体一样的花纹和扭曲装甲附着物……
不不不不会吧……！？
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER没有回答，只是默默地重新举起了自己的剑。
似乎是被她的动作所触发，DEAD MASTER也望向她，同时举起大镰，摆出战斗的姿态。
而她那双眼中毫无焦点，空洞的眼眶中浮现出的唯有一片虚无——
一击如闪电般袭来，BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER迅速迎击。
毫无预兆地——她与DEAD MASTER的死斗就此展开——
——了么？
华丽的斩击不断交错，炮击在空中飞舞，双方全力以赴，展开了激烈对决。
——但，某些地方似乎有些不对劲。
不知为何，她们战斗的余波始终没有波及奇尔沙治一行人所在的位置。
甚至连一块瓦砾的碎片，都没有飞溅过来——
恶作剧就到此为止吧。
……这么快就被你发现了？真没劲啊。
不过嘛，我刚才可是真的在“认真”战斗哟？
你知道什么叫“看时间、分场合”吗？
如果现在就把这场战斗分出个胜负……我也不是不行啦～
——但现在不是时候。
所以……也就是说……
扫描完成：确认该个体存在被侵蚀情况。但，只停留在表层。
……就像是“穿了一件衣服”那样？
那就是说，她并没有失去自我……而是借着这层“掩护”跟我们开了个玩笑？
还顺便袭击我们玩了玩……？
可能是因为和数量奇多的敌人战斗太久，积攒了一点压力吧。
所以才想趁着机会，全力活动一下筋骨。
……总之，暂时收敛一点吧
等问题解决了，想打多久都可以。
好啦好啦，知道了知道了～
……所以你们说完了是吧？那接下来，能不能解释一下，你们之间的关系到底是回事？
走了走了！大家别磨磨蹭蹭的！
——咯嘣！
等等，你们有没有听到什么声音？
……好像是从那堆净化者机体的残骸中发出的，不会要诈尸了吧？
满地残骸中，净化亲再次睁开了双眼。
呃……没想到那些污染这么厉害……
好像玩过头了……
不远处，见到此景的奇尔沙治一行人默默抬起了炮口。
等等——
别开炮——我要投降！！！

前往中枢.say: 等等——
别开炮——我要投降！！！
千钧一发之际，众人停止了酝酿中的攻击。
你说……你投降？难道你是净化亲？！
没错，没错~自己人嘛！
所以，这到底是怎么回事……？
这件事，说复杂也复杂，说简单也简单。
总而言之，就是——
……总而言之，就是你也不知道？
没错！
……真没用，净化亲。
不过我有一条别的情报哦！你们在寻找异常出现的源头吧？
刚好，我现在这副机体不知道为什么能够和塔内的部分区域共享数据。
我可以直接带你们前往源头位置哦！
那就快带我们去吧。
手下败将，前面带路~
是~
扫描数据已分析完毕。
从爆炸痕迹与污染物密度分布情况来看，此处区块，就是本次异常产生的源头区域。
而那台因为爆炸导致内部零件暴露的巨型机械，则是异常产生的“核心”。
TB所描述为“核心”的巨型机械，原本应该是某种调节虚像塔内环境的计算节点。
然而现在，它被某种蠕动的“东西”缠附着，一边报错一边持续不断地输出着异形的数据。
从敌人的强度上来看也很明显呢……
那些密密麻麻的……是被污染的测试者机体？
解析：除去缠附在其装甲上的侵蚀性附着物外，其机体构造与塞壬所使用的量产型机一致。
从现在起，将其正式名称定为“病毒型废弃塞壬”。
……由于系统受到病毒感染发生错误，进而生成了大量废弃型塞壬……应该就是本次事件的起因了？
我们在下层遭遇的那些怪物，也大概就是混杂着各楼层数据、更加劣质的废弃塞壬产物吧。
也就是说，我们只要把前面那台明显有问题的机器拆了，一切就能解决啦～！
……说得倒是简单，那片测试者机体构成的汪洋，你打得过吗？
不是还有你么？
我打不过哦！
之前不都说了，这里的机体就是……不知道因为什么程序错误随便从周围的破烂里拼起来的。
要是当当肉盾还行……去解决掉那么多测试者机体，我可做不到！
先别说“真没用，净化亲！”，我其实有个别的方案，不过先考考你们的领航员小姐。
你想到了么？
算力压制，用算力将扭曲异常的区域恢复正常，这样敌人数量和强度都会大幅下降了。
没错~这只是个独立的小机器，而你有整个港区的资源可用，那就交给你咯？
稍等，我正在向指挥官提出申请。
申请已得到确认，我正在调配资源并计算解决方案。还请诸位争取尽可能多的时间。
总而言之，还是得先打一场对吧？那我们还等什么，还打得动么？
当然。
全员，集中火力，先清理出一片安全区来！
在TB开始调配资源准备进行算力压制时，密集的敌人像察觉到了什么，向着众人疯狂进攻而来。
众人阵形被冲散，一时间只能各自为战。
敌人距离过近了……伟大的帝国，需要贴身护卫！
没事吧，帝国小姐。
得救了……多谢。
糟糕……小心，BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER小姐！不要硬接炮弹啊——！
就在BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER失去平衡的瞬间，DEAD MASTER滑步挡在她身前，一举斩杀了袭来的敌人。
还是太草率了呢。下次交手时，要不要我让点你？
终于，领航员-TB传来了好消息。
各项准备完成，现在开始执行算力压制计划，诸位，请尽可能与敌人拉开距离。
蓝色的数据流凭空涌出，所到之处，敌人和异常区域无声无息消失了。
很好，通向中心区域的道路通畅了，全员进行突击准备。
奇尔沙治召集众人准备集合火力突击，不过净化亲却摇了摇头。
压制的威力确实不错……不过比我预想中还差了很多。
只有这种程度的话，你们是消灭不掉污染核心的。
贸然接近，只会被后续生成的敌人吞没。
不过还好，我本来就没打算让你们去。
说来也巧，我的这台之中除了有我的数据碎片之外，还继承了我的一部分权限。
只要我亲自过去和那台机器连接在一起，就可以直接让其自毁了~
很简单的，你们站在这里看本净化亲的吧~
等等，如果机器自爆的话，你要怎么办？
当然是跟着一起——Boom！
哎呀，别这个表情，你们又不是不知道，我又死不掉。
我的主机根本不在这里，倒不如之前我为了离开这里已经试着自爆过了。
我只希望这一次，能够赶紧离开这个破破烂烂又莫名其妙的地方！
走了——！
于是，净化亲冲入了巨型机器的内部。
随后，伴随着爆炸声，本就已经外壳破损的计算节点彻底化为了一团火海。
TB，已确认目标被摧毁。
噢噢噢噢！太好了，问题搞定。
净化亲，我会想念你的……希望下次见你的时候能变强一些。
也就是说……眼前的问题算是处理完了？
应该是。
是啊，那就——开始吧。
两人几乎在同一时间跃身而退，摆出警戒姿态，哪怕刚刚才经历过死斗，动作却毫无迟滞。刀锋之上，杀意隐现。
等一下啊啊啊啊！为什么突然又这样了啊——！
不想被波及的话就闪开点。
不需要任何理由，不管发生什么，到最后都是这样。
无论是哪个世界，哪个时代，只要我和她相遇——就一定会变成这样。
我们就是背负着这样的命运。
嘴上说着话，身体却在悄然拉近距离，两人一点点地逼近对方，只要再迈出一步……那里就是生死分界之地——
等等！
令人意外的是，帝国冲入两人中间，用双手强行中断了这场一触即发的对峙。
事件还没有彻底结束，我们还没有离开虚像塔……你们就要开始了么？
又没人拦着你们，你们自己乖乖回去不就好了？
然后放任你们继续打下去么？
你们应该也发现了……这里是与你们原本所在之地截然不同之处。
我不知道你们以前是怎么相处的……
但是在这里，我所在的世界，你们还是像以前动起手来，所造成的会是什么后果你们真的清楚么？
至少我可不会为了置气，就去拿性命去赌一个“未知”。
也许是被帝国的这番话浇了冷水，两人都默默收起了武器。
DEAD MASTER虽然一脸不爽地撇过头，但也没再坚持。
总之，接下来先和我们一起返回港区。
如果你们之后还要打的话……我很乐意为你们安排一个正式的决斗场所哦。
真麻烦啊……我能拒绝么？
不能，TB，准备将我们一同接出去吧。
了解：正在执行回收程序。
蓝色的光幕从天而降，众人被光幕所笼罩，一时间就如同被固定了一般动弹不得。
等一下，突然搞什么啊！？
这是撤离前必要的净化程序，对身体无害，请不用担心。
……哈？我还没同意要走呢。
你也说点什么啊！！
……现在说什么恐怕都没用吧。既然我们是“异乡人”，现在就先乖乖听话好了。
光幕愈发强烈，虚像塔中的世界正逐渐变得模糊，碧海与蓝天之景正在缓缓浮现。
真是的——到底搞什么啊！
与此同时的港区行动指挥中心中——
呼……事情总算告一段落了。
话说，那两个人到底为什么会出现在虚像塔里啊？
现阶段缺乏足够的信息来验证该现象的具体原因。
我……无法解答。
没事，我也就是随口一问……反正这种事也不是第一次了。
各自有各自奇奇怪怪的理由嘛，我懂。
不过那两位，居然真的顺利从虚像塔里出来了。
那里不是只有数据化之后才能进去么？
这件事我也无法回答。
推测：或许与前一个问题相同，均与虚像塔内存在的某些特性有关。
——不管怎么说……现在她们是正式的客人了。
——既然是客人，那就要好好招待她们才行。
走吧，我们该去港口接人了——

sequence: ——「虚像世界的迷途者・关卡篇」·END

Visitors from a Virtual World.say: BANG! CLANG!
...Quick to fight. Same as ever.
That's the first rule of the battlefield, no?
...I've never heard of there being any rules in battle.
Indeed. Let that hold you back, and you'll end up beaten into the dirt!
Life or death...
BANG! CLANG!
Metal shrieked nonstop in the dark as two black-clad girls fiercely clashed, swinging their enormous weapons.
The walls shattered with each strike, sending debris flying and dust swirling through the air.
An empty area spread around the combatants, the result of their intense duel.
CLANG!
Haha, what's the matter? Surely you're not out of breath already.
Aww. Don't even have the energy to speak?
You've noticed it, haven't you?
...Aha. So you're not fighting me in your sleep.
Suddenly, the tense air between them vanished as they whipped around and stood back to back, pointing their blades toward the surrounding shadows.
A beastly growl shook the floor from within the dark.
At the same time, countless alien beings emerged from the black and encircled them.
What an interesting audience we have. Friends of yours?
I don't sense an urge to kill... but their hostility is clear.
God, you're always so boring! But I guess I knew that already.
Something is strange... Are they really our enemy?
Well, yes, of course. Look at them!
Maybe it'd be easier for us if we just let them do their thing... in a way.
...Not interested.
The girls continued their conversation, unbothered by the monsters approaching them.
All at once, the beasts unleashed a merciless assault on them...
But in the next instant, the girls' blades rushed forth and cut them all down in one fell swoop.
BANG! CLANG!
Say we resume what's left after we've finished these things off. Deal?
If I must. Anything else would be a waste of time, so I'm forced to help you.
With that brief exchange, they shot like bullets in opposite directions and charged into the enemy horde.
BWOOOOM!
After a short pause, there was a blinding flash immediately followed by the earsplitting sound of destruction.
Port - Radar Station
BEEP BEEP BEEP!
Red alert! All departments, be on guard! Anomaly detected!
Confirming.
Special alert confirmed. Identifying... Surveillance target activated.
Target identified as Virtual Tower.
Virtual Tower? As in... the Siren facility that appeared out of nowhere a while back?
It remained there even after the Mirror Sea was lifted.
Did someone activate that dormant facility...?
We have to contact the Commander!
*knock knock*
I heard the alarm. What's going on?
Good timing – we were just about to report to you. This is what we know so far...
Who knew we'd see the day that the Virtual Tower would do something?

Intelligence report: abnormal data observed in the waters near the target. The Virtual Tower is likely rebuilding the Mirror Sea. Monitoring devices are confirmed to be going offline one after another.
Before going offline, the monitors detected shockwaves from a suspected explosion in the area, but nothing of the sort has been visually confirmed.
Hypothesis: A weapons experiment may be taking place within.
Proposition: Form a fleet to investigate the target at once.
Agreed. Something is going on in there, and we can't stand idly by while it poses a threat.
It would be advisable to dispatch combat personnel, as hostiles may block the way to the tower.
I'm not surprised. Meanwhile... If the anomaly is inside the tower, then our recon team will probably need to go inside, right?
Yes. Through previous investigations, we have some grasp of its internal structure.
Calculating optimal operational plan. Estimated completion time: one hour and forty minutes.
Let's use that time to assemble the fleet. We need to get moving.
Helena, keep monitoring the situation for me. TB, keep in touch throughout the operation so that we can respond to any unexpected developments ASAP.
Orders received.
I'll gather combat and search personnel.
Okay. Everyone meets at the dock in two hours. Be sure to check your communications and equipment by then.
Roger!
What the heck is going on?
I'm supposed to be in the interstellar data stream...
So why am I here?
...Clones? Data backups? Mass-produced vessels?
What's with all these fragments of data?
Where am I? Why is my data here?
Weird...
Meh. It must be some kind of wacky bug, that's all.
Let me just reboot it and see what happens.

Traces of a Broken World.say: BANG! CLANG!
Tch... This is going nowhere.
Oh? Giving up already? Is that really all you've got?
You haven't changed one bit.
...Going through this over and over doesn't mean I'll start enjoying it.
That makes sense.
But...
BANG! CLANG!
Would it kill you to at least tell me how many of them are left?!
Meanwhile, in the entrance hall of the same tower...
Checking all members' vitals... All clear.
All instruments are in working order. I've already begun data collection.
Communications remain stable. No errors or loss detected in audio or data transmission.
The data protection barrier is operating properly, and radar and sensor values are being analyzed.
Question: Do you feel any physical discomfort?
Not particularly. You told us earlier it would be like going into a VR game, right?
But this feels so much more realistic than I'd imagined.
Same... I'm getting a little sleepy in here. If only this place had a bathtub. TB, can you make one?
Apologies. I do not have control over the Virtual Tower, so it is impossible for me to create objects.
Ah, shame.
Maybe I can sleep leaning on a wall...?
Impero reaches out to touch a wall, and the patterns on the walls and floor suddenly start to shift.
Be careful!
Kearsarge quickly pulls her away from the wall, but the change does not end.
The strange lines spread wildly like a virus, eerie and unnatural.
Hmm? What is this...
It looks like a creepy computer virus... Do you feel okay?
Yeah, I'm fine.
No issues detected in the data barrier. Likewise, no contamination detected in Impero.
Phew... I'm glad it doesn't seem to affect us at all.
Now we can explore with peace of mind.
First things first, let's check out the source of that suspected explosion.
Some time later, the search team led by Kearsarge was still making its way through the complex passages of the tower.
This is all we have. We've reached the end of what was mapped in previous expeditions.
TB, all the passages and nodes leading to other areas along the way were still dormant.
The shifting patterns from before don't seem to have activated these mysterious blocks, either.
The data barrier holds. We still lack information, so I suggest continuing forward to investigate further.
I've marked points on the map that may lead to the upper floor.
Roger that. Then let's get...
KABOOOOM!
With a sudden blast, a wall up ahead shattered. Amidst the dust, a girl in black rolled out from the breach.
Another one, dressed in the same color and wielding a large scythe, landed on her feet next to her.
Who goes there?!
The girls likewise noticed the search team's presence, looked at them, and sighed.
...Unlucky.
Don't sell us short. Have we ever been lucky, even once?
I'd think that the very fact that we're here is unlucky enough on its own.
...True.
KABOOOOM!
While they spoke only to each other, more holes were blown out of the wall. Lights flickered behind the openings.
The alien beings clambered through one after the other.
They resembled ordinary Sirens at first glance, but with an added element of uncanniness.
Oh, oooh... It's like a rare Siren expo! Ah, how fascinating!
Can these Sirens be moved out of the Virtual Tower?
We won't know until we try.
Put that idea to rest at once! Right now, we focus on neutralizing them.
Fine, fine. I can still get data mid-fight! Fine by me!
...You see those as enemies, then?
Obviously! At least we can communicate with you, unlike those Sirens.
Let's join together for now and clean up those monsters. Sound good?
I have no objections.
...Okay.
Again, their weapons danced and whirled, this time accompanied by the booming of artillery.
Uhh...
It should've restarted by now, right?
Why am I still here?
This is dumb. Guess I gotta self-destruct at this point.
Enough of these stupid fragments trapped in this stupid place...
Time to blow it all away!

From Cooperation to Confrontation.say: BANG! CLANG!
...Next.
My, my... Settling this with fisticuffs after all? How utterly barbaric.
The brilliant Impero won't be outdone. Go, my bombers.
Those two have almost cleared our port side. Focus on starboard!
Suppress them with a barrage! Don't let the enemy behind us!
Heeey, that one's the last one! Everyone, be gentle! Leave just one clean corpse for me, pleeease!
KABOOOOM!
When the smoke cleared, the strange Sirens were all gone.
Meanwhile, the two girls stopped simultaneously but stayed on guard, watching the search team warily.
I'm Kearsarge. These girls are Neptune, Impero, and Oleg. We fight together.
We shipgirls have always been battling the Sirens – the same kind of enemies we just took down.
Since you two were just fighting them as well, I think there's no reason for us to fight each other.
What do you think? Can you tell us your names?
...If that's what you want.
I am... BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER.
DEAD MASTER. It's up to you whether you'll be able to remember this, though.
Let's see. TB, is there any record of those names in our database?
Negative. No such records exist.
...In that case, I think we have more visitors on our hands.
So, how did the two of you end up here?
...I don't know.
One moment I was fighting BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER, and the next, we were here... That's basically it.
Among all of our visitors, you're the... calmest, by far. Impressive.
...We're used to this.
Happens all the time.
O-oh, I see... Well, I still have an important question for you.
Do you two exist? Or are you simple data like we are now?
Maybe we owe them an explanation before we ask existential questions.
So, as you can see, this is a very special place.
Hmm... Okay, so what is that supposed to mean for me, exactly?
...I can move freely, run, and swing my blade. Nothing else matters.
I'm relieved to hear that it doesn't bother you. We'd like to formally request your help in tackling the ongoing issues within this tower.
Oh, that won't do. We have a little fight to get back to.
Um... Why? I'm not seeing the point?
...I thought you would say that.
Let's go somewhere else and continue. Or do you want these poor girls involved?
Please hold on! I have an idea.
Like I said before, we have a common enemy. We don't have to work together, but our port would like to lend you our aid.
Hmm? Tell me more.
Greetings, Miss BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER and Miss DEAD MASTER. I am Navigator TB.
My role is to provide technical support to the search team throughout this operation.
I've recorded information regarding you and, upon the Commander's suggestion, I have prepared riggings to help you better adapt to the Virtual Tower's environment.
Rigging? Is that the equipment they were using?
Yes. Sending data packets.
When the blue light of the data stream faded, a few noticeable changes appeared around the two girls.
...It feels like part of me.
Oooh. This rigging is ever so convenient.
It reacts like it's part of my body. Fascinating. How does that work?
From our perspective, it's more fascinating how you swing such powerful weapons with those tiny, fleshy bodies of yours...
Power to the elevator has been restored. Please stand by until it's been charged.
There you have it. Let's get going!
I'll have to pass on using such an unreliable machine. I can handle myself – have fun.
Huh? Why? Going rogue isn't going to keep you safe...
Look, you all are fine, but I'm not about to play at friendship with this girl.
Remember, she and I are eternal enemies. Always have been, always will be.
It was as if DEAD MASTER's menacing words shattered the very walls. They suddenly collapsed, unleashing a fresh horde of Sirens, even more twisted and grotesque than the last.
We didn't even notice them until they were right next to us? This block construction surrounded by so many walls is going to be a nuisance.
Well, I'll be taking my leave.
Hey! Don't run around alone, please!
Ignoring the stunned search team, DEAD MASTER took her weapon in hand and plunged into the enemy horde in the blink of an eye.
Elevator charged. Please continue to stand by until the area around you is locked down.
Wait, we're locked in here?!
Ugh... What on earth is she thinking?
Even if she survives, who knows when we'll see her again?
...Don't worry. If I'm with you, she'll be back.
That's how we are.
There's no need to wait. Let's go.
Amidst the crumbling wreckage, Purity opened her eyes once again.
Okay, how long is this gonna keep going on?
Ugh... Forget it.
I don't see any way out of here right now... Might as well explore a bit, or something.

Something Alien.say: Despite a jarringly long wait, the elevator finally stopped.
The light enveloping the elevator faded, and the group stepped out onto a new floor.
Please be careful. The area ahead is unexplored ground.
Proceed with caution, and map the area as you go.
Understood. We'll be careful.
KABOOOOM!
Hmm? That was an explosion, wasn't it?!
...There's a battle up ahead.
Could it be... DEAD MASTER? Did she get here before us somehow?!
Let's go support her.

The wall on the other end of the passage collapsed from artillery fire. As twisted monsters poured through the breach, one figure stood out among them: a distorted humanoid, controlling some kind of massive equipment.
Strange patterns spread across its body, seemingly corrupted by something alien just like the rest of the tower.
Purifier? Or Purity...?
Analysis: This may be the elite Siren, Purifier.
Hypothesis: The tower's abnormal data may have contaminated her.
...Could it be that Purity herself got contaminated?
It cannot be ruled out. More performance data is required for more precise speculation.
The girls' hesitation gave the twisted Purifier time to draw closer, slow but sure.
...Here it comes!
Can't be helped. Fight first, figure out the rest later!
KABOOOOM!
Stronger than expected... That patterned shell makes it incredibly tough to crack.
I can't find an opening at all. Guess I'll just have to ratchet up the firepower!
Stand back, everyone.
Warning: extremely high energy levels detected.
The instant BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER and TB shouted their warnings, space itself seemed to rupture, and a searing flash of steel streaked past.
The lightning-fast strike cleaved the twisted Purifier in two. Its mangled body collapsed to the ground.
Next to the wreckage was the other girl in black, DEAD MASTER.
DEAD MASTER? Thank goodness you're safe...
You're fast. Thanks for the backup.
...Wait.
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER's voice interrupted the shipgirls' approach.
Look closer. DEAD MASTER and her rigging...
Huh?! She has that same messed-up pattern as that Purifier... and her rigging is all weird, too!
Could it be...?
Without a word, BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER silently raised her sword once more.
As if triggered by this move, DEAD MASTER turned to her, lifting her massive scythe and assuming a battle-ready stance.
Her eyes were lifeless, the hollow sockets holding nothing but void.
Like a bolt of lightning, an attack struck; BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER instantly countered.
Thus, another battle to the death had begun between these two fated rivals...
...Or had it?
A dazzling exchange of strikes flew constantly between them. This time, their all-out duel was backed by fierce artillery fire.
But something was wrong.
For some reason, the shockwaves from their clashes always stopped just short of reaching the search team.
Not so much as a speck of rubble grazed them.
...Put an end to this stupid prank.
You already figured me out? Always such a buzzkill.
But I'll have you know that I'm fighting every bit as seriously as ever.
Do you know the phrase, "time and place"?
If I really wanted to put an end to our little contest here and now, I could do it~
Now is not the time.
Does this mean...
Scanning... Corrosion confirmed, but only at a surface level.
So she's wearing it like clothes?
That means... her mind is totally intact? She's just like that?
And she attacked us for the hell of it because she had an excuse?!
Maybe she's a little stressed from fighting so many enemies for so long.
That's why she wants to stretch and have "fun."
Umm...
Be patient for now.
When this problem is solved, we'll have all the time in the world to fight.
Okay, okay. I get it.
Are we done now? Can anyone explain what the deal is between you two?
Let's go, everyone! No more dilly-dallying!
Come ON!
CLUNK!
Hey, did anyone else hear that just now?
It came from that Purifier vessel's wreckage. No way... Is it coming back to life?!
From within the scattered debris, Purity's eyes opened anew.
Uuugh... I didn't think the contamination would be this bad.
I might've gotten a little carried away...
The search team watched, stunned, and quietly raised their cannons.
WHOA, WHOA, WHOA, WAIT!
DON'T SHOOT! I SURRENDEEER!

To the Core.say: WHOA, WHOA, WHOA, WAIT!
DON'T SHOOT! I SURRENDEEER!
Everyone's attacks stopped on a dime right before the finishing blow.
...Come again?
Surrender? Wait, you really are Purity?!
That's riiight~☆ I'm basically one of you guys!

Sooo, basicallyyy... It's complicated and simple, at the same time.
To put it briefly...
All I'm hearing is that you don't know, either!
Yep! That about sums it up!
Stupid, useless Purity.
But listen! I know other stuff. You're looking for the source of all this, right?
How convenient! For some reason, some of the map data of this tower's been shared with my vessel here!
That means I can show you straight to the core!
Then do it. Now.
Lead the way, little loser.
Okie-dokie!
Scan results analyzed.
Judging from the explosion's traces and the density and distribution of pollutants, this block is the source of the anomaly.
The giant machine there, its interior exposed by the explosion, would be the core of said anomaly.
The enormous machine TB described as the "core" was originally meant to be a computing node that normally managed the internal environment of the tower.
However, some writhing creature had taken over, continuously outputting errors and alien data.
You can really tell from how strong the hostiles are...
Are all those things packed in there... contaminated Tester vessels?
Analysis: Except for the corrosive growths attached to the armor, their structures are consistent with those of the mass-produced vessels used by the Sirens.
Henceforth to be referred to as "Viral Junk Sirens."
The system was infected by a virus, and the resulting glitch is causing it to generate all these junk Sirens...
The things we saw on the lower floors must have been even shoddier junk Sirens, probably the result of data from all the different floors getting mixed in.
What I'm hearing is, we just have to destroy that core machine right there, and all our problems are solved!
...Easier said than done. How do you mean to destroy that army of Testers?
Don't we have you on our side?
I can't do it!
Like I told you on the way here, this vessel is just a hodgepodge of junk thrown together at random because of some stupid program error!
I can tank a few hits for you, maybe, but if you think I'm soloing all those things, you'll be sorely disappointed!
Tch...
I'm tired of you calling me useless! Look, I've got a plan, but I need to talk with your navigator first.
What do you think?
Proposition: Suppress computing power. By using our computing resources to return the corrupted areas to normal, we can greatly reduce both the number of enemies and their overall strength.
Exactly! This thing's just a crappy little machine, while you've got the resources of the entire port in the palm of your hand. So do something!
Please wait a moment. Issuing request to the Commander.
Request approved. Allocating resources and calculating solutions. Please buy as much time as possible.
You're saying we need to fight anyway? Then let's get started. Can you still fight?
Of course.
Everyone, focus your firepower! Begin by securing a safe zone around us!
Seemingly sensing TB's attempt to gather computing resources, the dense swarm of enemies charged frantically toward the team.
The girls' formation shattered under the onslaught, and for a moment, they were each forced to fight alone.
They're too close... My brilliant brain requires backup to function properly!
BANG!
Are you okay, Impero?
Phew... Thanks for saving me.
KABOOOOM!
This is bad... Be careful, BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER! Don't let them get a clean hit on you!
Urgh!
The moment BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER lost her balance, DEAD MASTER glided in front of her, eliminating the attacking enemy with one swift, decisive blow.
You're still too careless. Should I hold back next time we fight?
Eventually, good news came from TB.
All preparations are complete. Now implementing computing power suppression. Please stay as far from the enemy as possible.
A blue data stream appeared out of thin air. Every hostile it touched, along with the abnormal area, was quietly engulfed by it.
Perfect! We have a path to the core now. Everyone, prepare for assault!
Kearsarge summoned everyone to her side to focus their firepower, but Purity stopped them.
The suppression is working, but it's nowhere near as much as I was hoping.
At this rate, we can't destroy the contaminated core.
If you get too close now, you'll just be swallowed up by the next wave it generates.
Not that I planned to let you all do it in the first place.
Nope, lucky you, I've got more than just data in this vessel – I inherited a few permissions, too!
As long as I can get physical access to that machine, I can send a self-destruct command!
You nerds just watch me save the day!
But if the core explodes, then what happens to you?
You know. Bam! Dead as a doornail.
Aw, don't look at me like that. You know I won't ACTUALLY die, right?
My mainframe isn't here. In fact, I've already self-destructed a bunch of times today.
I just hope this time gets me out of this hellhole!
Let's gooooo!
With that, Purity charged into the interior of the machine.
There was a boom as the computing node burst into glorious flames.
TB, target destruction confirmed.
Oooh! She did it! That's another problem solved!
I'll never forget you, Purity... May you return stronger than ever before.
Am I hearing them right? Our little problem here is dealt with?
Probably.
Good. In that case, shall we?
Both girls jumped away simultaneously and readied their weapons, as if they hadn't just won a life-or-death battle by the skin of their teeth. Their blades dripped with murderous intent.
Whaaat?! I seriously don't get why you're... Do you just ALWAYS do this?!
Stay out of this if you don't want to get caught in the crossfire.
We don't need a reason. No matter what, things always come to this.
No matter what world, no matter what era. We meet, and we fight.
That's the fate placed upon us.
Even as they talked, the two carefully closed the distance between them. One more step, and they would once again straddle the bounds of life and death...
Hold on!
Impero rushed between the two and forced their confrontation to come to a grinding halt.
Things aren't completely finished yet. We haven't left the Virtual Tower.
Then why don't you all just go?
And let you two kill each other?
You should realize by now that this place is nothing like whatever world you came from.
I don't know how things worked for you before, but...
Or do you really think you know what will come of your stupid fight when you don't belong in this world in the first place?
As for me, I'M not gambling my life on unknowns, I'll tell you that much.
It seemed Impero's words had quelled their fire; both girls silently lowered their weapons.
DEAD MASTER was clearly unhappy with this, but she didn't push the matter any further.
For now, come back to port with us.
If you still want to fight, then Sardegna will gladly arrange a formal duel for you.
Sounds like a lot of unnecessary effort to me. What if I say no?
Overruled. TB, get everyone out of here – INCLUDING them.
Understood. Executing recovery program.
A curtain of blue light descended, enveloping the girls. For a moment, they were rendered immobile.
Hey, what's going on here?!
A necessary purification procedure before your evacuation. It will not harm you, so please remain calm.
What?! I didn't agree to this!
Say something, damn it!
...I don't think anything we can say would matter. We're outsiders. Let's obey for now.
The light intensified, and the tower began to blur. In its place appeared an expanse of deep-blue water and sky.
Uuugh! I can't stand this!
Meanwhile, in the port's command center...
Phew... That settles that matter.
Why do you think those two were in the Virtual Tower to begin with?
At present, there is not enough information to investigate the precise reason.
Unfortunately, I cannot answer your inquiry.
I was just asking out of curiosity, so don't worry about it. This isn't the first time something like this has happened, anyway.
We already know these people all come with their own unique, if not strange, circumstances.
Still, I can't believe they exited the tower so smoothly...
You can't go in there without being made into data in the first place, right?
I cannot answer this question either.
Hypothesis: Some particular trait of the Virtual Tower may be the cause of their appearance and smooth exit.
Either way, they're our guests now.
We should give them a warm welcome.
Let's go and greet them right away.

말하면서 점차 서로 거리를 좁히는 두 사람. 금방이라도 생사를 건 싸움이 시작되려는 그 순간……
잠깐!
용감하게 두 사람 사이, 그 가운데로 뛰어들어 두 팔을 벌리며 싸움을 저지한 이는 바로 임페로였다.
사태는 아직 완전히 끝나지 않았어. 아직 환상의 탑을 벗어나지 못했잖아.
너희들끼리 알아서 가면 되는 거 아니야?
그냥 이대로 방치하고 갈 수는 없잖아.
둘 다 이미 알고 있을 텐데… 여긴 너희가 있던 세상과 전혀 다른 곳이라는 걸.
지금까지 어떻게 지냈는지, 임페로는 잘 모르지만…
여기서 이 세상의 존재가 아닌 두 사람이 싸우면 어떤 결과가 초래될지, 아무도 모르잖아?
적어도 임페로는 그런 불확실한 거에 목숨을 걸고 싶지 않아.
임페로의 용기(?)있는 행동에 독기가 빠졌는지, 두 사람은 동시에 검을 내렸다.
DEAD MASTER는 불만족스러운 표정이었지만, 그렇다고 이의를 제기하지는 않았다.
아무튼 일단 같이 모항으로 돌아가자.
싸우고 싶으면 나중에 사르데냐 엠파이어에서 정식으로 싸울 장소를 마련해 줄게.
그건 귀찮은데…… 거절해도 돼?
안 돼. TB, 밖으로 내보내 줘. 저 두 사람도 포함해서.
승인: 회수 프로그램 실행 중.
푸른 빛의 장막이 하늘에서 내려와 일행을 감쌌다. 그 순간 모두의 움직임이 고정된 듯 멈춰버렸다.
자, 잠깐! 이건 뭐야?!
탈출 전에 필요한 정화 과정입니다. 몸에 해는 없으니 안심하시기 바랍니다.
뭐어?! 누가 떠난다고 그랬어!
너도 뭐라고 말 좀 해 봐!
……지금 무슨 말을 해도 통할 것 같지 않아. 이방인으로서 얌전히 있자.
빛이 점점 강해지면서 환상의 탑이 속한 세상이 희미해졌다. 그 대신 바다와 하늘이 자아내는 푸른 풍경이 천천히 떠올랐다.
으아! 뭐야, 대체!
모항, 브리핑 룸
후우…… 드디어 일단락된 것 같네.
그나저나 두 사람은 왜 환상의 탑에 있었던 걸까?
현 단계에서는 그 현상의 구체적인 원인을 규명할 만큼 충분한 정보가 존재하지 않습니다.
그래서… 그 질문에는 답해드릴 수 없습니다.
괜찮아, 그냥 물어본 거니까. 애초에 이런 일이 처음 있었던 것도 아니고, 뭐……
다들 저마다 묘한 사정이 하나씩 있는 것도 이젠 익숙하거든.
그나저나 그 두 사람… 어떻게 환상의 탑에서 무사히 나온 걸까?
원래 데이터화를 거치지 않으면 들어갈 수 없는 곳 아니었어?
그 점에 대해서도 대답해 드릴 수 없습니다.
추측: 앞서 언급하신 문제와 마찬가지로 환상의 탑 내부에 존재하는 어떤 특성이 영향을 미쳤을 가능성이 있습니다.

――반갑게 맞이해 줘야지.
――자, 항구로 마중 나가자.

我和她，可是永遠的宿敵哦？
彷彿回應DEAD MASTER這句充滿殺氣的話語，周圍的牆壁突然崩塌，比先前更為扭曲醜惡的塞壬人形生物體蜂擁而出。
已經靠到這麼近了我們才察覺……這些一道道牆壁圍成的區塊……真是麻煩。
那麼諸位，先走一步了~
等等，現在不要亂跑啊——！
無視一旁滿臉困惑的探索隊成員，DEAD MASTER一人舉起武器，轉瞬間消失在怪物的海洋中。
升降梯充能完畢，正在封閉中，請諸位繼續等待。
糟糕……升降梯被某種光芒封閉，我們出不去了！
……真是的，這個人到底在想什麼。
就算她能活下來，之後恐怕也很難再跟我們匯合了……
……沒關係，我們一定會再匯合的。
我們就是「注定如此」的存在。
因此，我們無需停留，繼續前進。
滿地殘骸中，淨化親再次睜開了雙眼。
我說，沒完沒了了吧？
既然暫時跑不出去……去四處轉轉好了。

異形之物.say: 經過了一段比預想中更長的時間，升降梯終於停了下來。
籠罩在升降梯週邊的光芒消散後，一行人正式踏入了新的一層。
請注意，此處之後是先前探索行動中從未涉及的區域。
請一邊繪製地圖，一邊謹慎前進。
明白，我們會注意的。
咦？這個是爆炸的聲音吧！
……有人在前方戰鬥。
難道是DEAD MASTER小姐嗎……？她到得居然比我們還早？
走，我們快去支援。
前方通道盡頭的牆壁在炮火中崩塌，扭曲的怪物中，一個操控著巨型裝備的扭曲的人形顯得格外顯眼。
其身體遍布著異樣的花紋，如同虛像塔的多數區域一般被某種異形之物侵蝕了。
淨化者……？還是淨化親……？
解析：塞壬高階人型單位——淨化者。
推測：由於塔中異常資料而產生的汙染型機體，請保持高度戒備。
……是淨化親被汙染的可能性呢？
暫時無法排除，需要更多其性能數據。
一行人猶豫之際，那個扭曲的淨化者集體正緩慢卻堅定地接近——
——來了！
沒辦法了……總之，打完再說！
比預想之中更強大……那層花紋外殼，大大增加了其防禦力。
完全找不到破綻……要加大火力輸出了！
大家後退
警告：偵測到高能量體反應。
就在BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER與TB一同發出警告時，空間突然炸裂，一道凌厲的劍光一閃而過。
電光石火之間，扭曲的淨化者機體被一擊切斷，癱瘓在地上。
而在其身邊，已然多出一名黑衣少女的身影——那正是DEAD MASTER。
DEAD MASTER小姐？見到妳平安無事真是太好了。
來得這麼快……感謝支援。
……等一下。
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER出面制止了想要前去打招呼的探索隊員們。
……仔細看，DEAD MASTER和她身上的裝備。
？！和那台淨化者機體一樣的花紋和扭曲裝甲附著物…
不不不不會吧……！？
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER沒有回答，只是默默地重新舉起了自己的劍。
似乎是被她的動作觸發，DEAD MASTER也望向她，同時舉起大鐮，擺出戰鬥的姿態。
而她那雙眼毫無焦點，空洞的眼眶中浮現出的唯有一片虛無——
一擊如閃電般襲來，BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER迅速迎擊。
毫無預警地——她與DEAD MASTER的死鬥就此展開——
——了嗎？
華麗的斬擊不斷交錯，炮擊在空中飛舞，雙方全力以赴，展開了激烈對決。
——但，某些地方似乎有些不對勁。
不知為何，她們戰鬥的餘波始終沒有波及奇爾沙治一行人所在的位置。
甚至連一塊瓦礫的碎片，都沒有飛濺過來——
惡作劇就到此為止吧。
……這麼快就被妳發現了？真沒勁啊。
不過嘛，我剛才可是真的在「認真」戰鬥喲？
妳知道什麼叫「看時間、分場合」嗎？
如果現在就把這場戰鬥分出勝負……我也不是不行啦～
——但現在不是時候。
所以……也就是說……
掃描完成：確認該個體有被侵蝕情況。但，只停留在表層。
……就像是「穿了一件衣服」那樣？
那就是說，她並沒有失去自我……而是藉著這層「掩護」跟我們開了個玩笑？
還順便襲擊我們玩了玩……？
可能是因為和數量奇多的敵人戰鬥太久，累積了一點壓力吧。
所以才想趁著機會，全力活動一下筋骨。
總之，暫時收斂一點吧
等問題解決了，想打多久都可以。
好啦好啦，知道了知道了～
……所以妳們說完了是吧？那接下來，能不能解釋一下，妳們之間的關係到底是一回事？
走了走了！大家別磨磨蹭蹭的！
——咯嘣！
等等，妳們有沒有聽到什麼聲音？
……好像是從那堆淨化者機體的殘骸中發出的，不會要詐屍了吧？
滿地殘骸中，淨化親再次睜開了雙眼。
呃……沒想到那些汙染這麼厲害……
好像玩過頭了……
不遠處，見到此景的奇爾沙治一行人默默抬起了炮口。
等等——
別開炮——我要投降！！！

前往中樞.say: 等等——
別開炮——我要投降！！！
千鈞一髮之際，眾人停止了醞釀中的攻擊。
妳說……妳投降？難道妳是淨化親？！
沒錯，沒錯~自己人嘛！
所以，這到底是怎麼回事……？
這件事，說複雜也複雜，說簡單也簡單。
總而言之，就是——
……總而言之，就是妳也不知道？
沒錯！
……真沒用，淨化親。
不過我有一條別的情報哦！妳們在尋找異常出現的源頭吧？
剛好，我現在這副機體不知道為什麼能夠和塔內的部分區域共享資料。
我可以直接帶妳們前往源頭位置哦！
那就快帶我們去吧。
手下敗將，前面帶路~
是~
掃描數據已分析完畢。
從爆炸痕跡與汙染物密度分佈來看，此處區塊，就是本次異常產生的源頭區域。
而那台因為爆炸導致內部零件暴露的巨型機械，則是異常產生的「核心」。
TB所描述為「核心」的巨型機械，原本應該是某種調節虛像塔內環境的運算節點。
然而現在，它被某種蠕動的「東西」纏著，一邊報錯一邊持續不斷地輸出著異形的數據。
從敵人的強度來看也很明顯呢……
那些密密麻麻的……是被汙染的測試者機體？
解析：除去纏附在其裝甲上的侵蝕性附著物外，其機體構造與塞壬所使用的量產型機一致。
從現在起，將其正式名稱定為「病毒型廢棄塞壬」。
……由於系統受到病毒感染發生錯誤，進而生成了大量廢棄型塞壬……應該就是這次事件的起因了？
我們在下層遭遇的那些怪物，也大概就是混雜著各樓層資料、更劣質的廢棄塞壬產物吧。
也就是說，我們只要把前面那台明顯有問題的機器拆了，一切就能解決啦～！
……說得倒是簡單，那片測試者機體構成的汪洋，妳打得過嗎？
不是還有妳嗎？
我打不過哦！
之前不都說了，這裡的機體就是……不知道因為什麼程式錯誤隨便從周圍的破爛裡拼起來的。
要是當當肉盾還行……去解決掉那麼多測試者機體，我可做不到！
先別說「真沒用，淨化親！」，我其實有個別的方案，不過先考考妳們的領航員小姐。
妳想到了嗎？
算力壓制，用算力將扭曲異常的區域恢復正常，這樣敵人數量和強度都會大幅下降了。
沒錯~這只是個獨立的小機器，而妳有整個港區的資源可用，那就交給妳了？
稍等，我正在向指揮官提出申請。
申請已得到確認，我正在調配資源併計算解決方案。也請諸位爭取盡可能多的時間。
總而言之，還是得先打一場對吧？那我們還在等什麼，還打得動麼？
當然。
全員，集中火力，先清出一片安全區來！
當TB開始調配資源準備進行算力壓制時，密集的敵人像察覺到了什麼，向著眾人瘋狂進攻而來。
眾人陣形被沖散，一時間只能各自為戰。
敵人距離過近了……偉大的帝國，需要貼身護衛！
沒事吧，帝國小姐。
得救了……多謝。
糟糕……小心，BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER小姐！不要硬接炮彈啊——！
就在BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER失去平衡的瞬間，DEAD MASTER滑步擋在她身前，一舉斬殺了襲來的敵人。
還是太草率了呢。下次交手時，要不要我讓讓妳？
終於，領航員-TB傳來了好消息。
各項準備完成，現在開始執行算力壓制計劃，各位，請盡可能與敵人拉開距離。
藍色的資料流憑空湧出，所到之處，敵人和異常區域無聲無息消失了。
很好，通往中心區域的道路通暢了，全員進行突擊準備。
奇爾沙治召集眾人準備集合火力突擊，不過淨化親卻搖了搖頭。
壓制的威力確實不錯……不過比我預想中還差了很多。
只有這種程度的話，妳們是消滅不掉汙染核心的。
貿然接近，只會被後續生成的敵人吞沒。
不過還好，我本來就沒打算讓妳們去。
說來也巧，我的這台之中除了有我的資料碎片之外，還繼承了我的一部分權限。
只要我親自過去和那台機器連在一起，就可以直接讓其自毀了~
很簡單的，妳們站在這裡看本淨化親的吧~
等等，如果機器自爆的話，妳該怎麼辦？
當然是跟著一起——Boom！
哎呀，別這個表情，妳們又不是不知道，我又死不掉。
我的主機根本不在這裡，倒不如之前我為了離開這裡已經試著自爆過了。
我只希望這一次，能夠趕緊離開這個破破爛爛又莫名其妙的地方！
走了——！
於是，淨化親衝入了巨型機器的內部。
隨後，伴隨著爆炸聲，本來就已經外殼破損的計算節點這地化為了一團火海。
TB，已確認目標被摧毀。
噢噢噢噢！太好了，問題搞定。
淨化親，我會想念妳的……希望下次遇見妳的時候能變強一些。
也就是說……眼前的問題算是處理完了？
應該是。
是啊，那就——開始吧。
兩人幾乎在同一時間躍身而退，擺出警戒姿態，哪怕剛剛才經歷過死鬥，動作卻毫無遲滯。刀鋒之上，殺意隱現。
等一下啊啊啊啊！為什麼突然又這樣了啊——！
不想被波及的話就閃開點。
不需要任何理由，不管發生什麼，到最後都是這樣。
無論是哪個世界，哪個時代，只要我跟她相遇——就一定會變成這樣。
我們就是背負著這樣的命運。
嘴上說著話，身體卻在悄然拉近距離，兩人一點點地逼近對方，只要再邁出一步……那裡就是生死分界之地——
等等！
令人意外的是，帝國衝入兩人中間，將雙手強行中斷了這場一觸即發的對峙。
事件還沒徹底結束，我們還沒離開虛像塔……妳們就要開始了嗎？
又沒人攔著妳們，妳們自己乖乖回去不就好了？
然後放任妳們繼續打下去嗎？
你們應該也發現了……這裡是與你們原本所在之地截然不同之處。
我不知道妳們以前是怎麼相處的……
但在這裡，我所在的世界，妳們還是像以前動起手來，所造成的會是什麼後果妳們真的清楚嗎？
至少我可不會為了賭氣，就去拿性命去賭一個「未知」。
也許是被帝國的這番話澆了冷水，兩人都默默收起了武器。
DEAD MASTER雖然一臉不爽地撇過頭，但也沒再堅持。
總之，接下來先和我們一起返回港區。有戰鬥意願的話，之後薩丁帝國很樂意
如果妳們之後還要打的話……我很樂意為你們安排一個正式的決鬥場所哦。
真麻煩啊……我能拒絕嗎？
不能，TB，準備將我們一同接出去吧。
了解：正在執行回收程序。
藍色的光幕從天而降，眾人被光幕所籠罩，一時間就如同被固定了一般動彈不得。
等一下，突然搞什麼啊！？
這是撤離前必要的淨化程序，對身體無害，請不用擔心。
……哈？我還沒答應要走呢。
妳也說點什麼啊！！
……現在說什麼恐怕都沒用。既然我們是「異鄉人」，現在就先乖乖聽話好了。
光幕愈發強烈，虛像塔中的世界正逐漸變得模糊，碧海與藍天之景正緩緩浮現。
真是的——到底是搞什麼啊！
同時的港區行動指揮中心中——
呼……事情總算告一段落了。
話說，那兩個人到底為什麼會出現在虛像塔裡啊？
現階段缺乏足夠的資訊來驗證該現象的具體原因。
我……無法解答。
沒事，我也就是隨口一問……反正這種事也不是第一次了。
各自有各自奇奇怪怪的理由嘛，我懂。
不過那兩位，居然真的順利從虛像塔裡出來了。
那裡不是只有數據化之後才能進去嗎？
這件事我也無法回答。
推測：或許與前一個問題相同，均與虛像塔內存在的某些特性有關。
——不管怎麼說……現在她們是正式的客人了。
——既然是客人，那就要好好招待她們才行。
走吧，我們該去港口接人了——

sequence: ——「虛像世界的迷途者・關卡篇」·END
